gpt_oss_120b_interpretation.construction: PASS: the campaign proved a byte-complete whole artifact near 0.77 BPW with 183/183 rows sealed and exact accounting.
gpt_oss_120b_interpretation.capability: FAIL at sub-bit: byte completeness did not preserve the frozen real-forward capability contract.
gpt_oss_120b_interpretation.uniform_control: NEGATIVE: RVQ near 1.0 BPW produced 3 collapse, 3 degraded, and 0 capability passes; next-token agreement was 0.11-0.63 against the 0.95 gate.
gpt_oss_120b_interpretation.mechanism_prior: On GPT-OSS, expert input-side mlp1 was comparatively robust while the heavy-tailed output-side mlp2 benefited from protected islands.
gpt_oss_120b_interpretation.operating_conclusion: Do not repeat uniform sub-bit RVQ, do not lower gates, and do not confuse the 0.77 construction floor with a capability-preserving floor.

organ_diagnosis.conclusion: Qwen reverses the direct 120B robustness ordering on this activation; gate/up need more budget.
